title: GPU Cloud Deployment Without Leaving Your IDE — Audry Hsu, RunPod
summary: Flash is a deployment framework that streamlines GPU cloud deployment from IDEs using a single decorator. It enables hot reload for model swaps without container rebuilds and supports chaining multiple models. RunPod offers both pod-based and serverless deployment options with per-second H100 GPU pricing.
writeup: This talk introduces Flash, a deployment framework that pushes GPU cloud deployment to RunPod directly from an IDE using a single decorator. It demonstrates hot reload for swapping models without rebuilding containers, and it supports chaining multiple models together. RunPod is presented with two deployment paths, pod-based and serverless, alongside per-second H100 GPU pricing aimed at cost optimization.
